title: gilibertia membranifolia
intro: Gilibertia membranifolia, also known as the "New Zealand gilbertia" or "leatherleaf," is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpenoids. The health benefits of Gilibertia membranifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Gilibertia membranifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional Maori rituals for its spiritual and cultural significance.
